data.body:
3-Year Anniversary Special Page Reveal

Sensei, we're celebrating the upcoming 3-Year Anniversary with special events, including pre-registration and a live stream! Make sure to check it out! ❤

➡️Special Page: https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2024/10/3rd?channel=6030101
